briefdescription.para: This function initializes the core instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to core instance to be worked upon
is instance id of the core

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if device is found and initialized XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if device is not found

briefdescription.para: This function starts the letter box core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function stops the letter box core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the letterbox active window.

detaileddescription.para: All pixels within the window are passed to the output as-is. Any pixel outside the defined window will be clamped to the programmed background color

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance to be worked on.
is structure that contains window coordinates and size

memberdef.argsstring: (XV_Lbox_l2 *InstancePtr, XLboxColorId ColorId, XVidC_ColorFormat cfmt, XVidC_ColorDepth bpc)
memberdef.name: XV_LboxSetBackgroundColor

briefdescription.para: This function configures the background color to be painted outside active window.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance to be worked on.
is the color format of the input stream
is the color depth (bits per channel)

briefdescription.para: This function prints LBox IP status on the console.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the core instance.
